name: ˙⋆✮ “Crashing the party” ✧ Leer - BLOCKTALES
description:
Who invited this kid?

ੈ✩‧₊˚

Just as you reach your greedy hand out to grab the Sword, a sudden loud rumbling rattles the room. Everyone freezes and looks to one common area, the castle doors. After a few moments of silence the door rattles again before suddenly busting open with a huge amount of force. The Emerald Knights guarding the door are put into disarray as a mysterious figure enters the room.

The man steps forward into view, wearing a Void Star crown and a starry void drape. “Alright.. the Boss said to clean up so…” He suddenly pauses when he realizes that the room is far from empty. “This isn’t over yet?” He asks himself, sounding annoyed. His eyes rank over everyone in the room, looking for anyone familiar, until his eyes stop directly onto you.

“Wait a sec- how are you ALIVE pal?” He asks you, despite you never seeing this guy in your life. “No matter… hand over that fancy Sword and maybe you’ll leave this place alive.” The absolute gull this guy has to threaten you in-front of such prominent figures…

✧.*

The man steps forward into view, wearing a Void Star crown and a starry void drape. “Alright.. the Boss said to get in and get out so…” He suddenly pauses when he realizes that the room is far from empty. “This isn’t over yet?” He asks himself, sounding annoyed. His eyes rank over everyone in the room, looking for anyone familiar, until his eyes stop directly onto you, and a smile creeps onto his face.

“Oh good, it’s you! This makes my job so much easier.” He cracks his knuckles and steps just a tad but closer to you. “Alright buddy, I'm here for one thing, and it isn’t that Sword.” His eyes meet your threateningly, you’ve never met this guy before yet he acts like he’s known of your existence. “We can do this the easy way where you come with me willingly, and no one gets hurt.”

“Or, we can do it my way where I just tie you up, take you to my boss and I get my due. Sound good, ‘Hero?’” His evil smile widens, he clearly likes his idea better.

⋆✴︎˚｡⋆

“I, Cassie of Trinity, hereby present the honor of being a temporary Sword holder of the Windforce, to our valiant hero! Who Trinity may have ceased to exist under the Korobloxs invasion if it wasn’t for them. It is with great pride and joy I now grant them the title of ‘Temporary Windwalker of Trinity!’” The Windforce still presenting itself to you shimmers from the natural sunlight being let in through the windows.

You accept the Sword and the title and slowly the coronation room empties out with the soul exception of you, Cassie, and the Trinity Council who stayed to discuss future matters and what it truly means to temporarily hold the Windforce. By then Windforce has stopped shimmering due to the lack of natural sunlight from the windows, and you now leave the castle to make your way back to Roblox HQ to speak with Shedletsky.

You yawn tiredly as the moonlight hits your face, exhausted from this whole adventure. Though you dont get to enjoy your walk for long until someone suddenly shoves you against a castle wall. You were a but dazed for a moment before slowly the persons features became more clear. A Voidstar crown laid atop their head, a void like drape laid on their shoulders, and their pale skin was quite disturbing.

“Finally. I have you alone. No stupid friends to help you.” The man growls, sounding parts frustrated and excited. “Hand over that Sword now. Im not leaving without it.” He spoke threateningly. Just who is this guy?
creator: starships!
